calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Petition For Change Of Gender
Off Calendar Nov-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of GENDER.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Petitioner, Sabrina J. Middaugh present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Upon consideration of the Petition and the supporting declaration, the Court grants petition of Sabrina J. Middaugh.
The gender is changed from MALE to FEMALE.
Decree signed in open court.
